reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion.Soy socio del ACA y tengo sentido de pertenencia a la institución.Me aloje en el motel,y tambien me sentí muy bien atendido en el almuerzo por una empleada muy carismatica y particular,la cual no recuerdo su nombre.Felicitaciones!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I'm an ACA member and feel a strong sense of belonging to the institution. I stayed at the motel, and I also received excellent service at lunch from a very charismatic and unique employee, whose name I can't recall. Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJam9EX2RnEAE
